fields.title: Epic: tau post-migration cleanup (shared utils + boundaries)
fields.description:
Goal: follow-up refactors after consolidating many extensions into `extensions/tau`.

Scope:
- remove dead code
- move shared helpers into `extensions/tau/src/shared/`
- reduce duplication between sandbox/task/registry
- keep behavior unchanged (refactor-only)

Motivation:
- avoid drift (duplicate deepMerge/readJsonFile/migrateApprovalPolicy)
- clearer boundaries (task shouldn't re-implement sandbox config logic)
- remove stdout logging from extensions
fields.close_reason: Done: moved shared helpers to shared/, removed duplication, and improved type safety.
